_comment: SYNTHETIC runtime artifact — NOT produced by executing anything. It stands in for a resolved IAT a dynamic producer (e.g. an IAT-rebuilder on a packed sample) would emit: call-sites whose imported targets static analysis could not recover, now resolved to concrete symbols. Functions are named to match the mathlib static model so the seam-merge lands on existing StableIds. This is the de-risk fixture the eval prescribed — see SPIKE-REPORT.md.
